calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-09-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Mikalai R. Hiroshau, Esq., appearing for Petitioner Ilona Brusil, mother of minor present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
Order waiving consent of other parent on file.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Janette Samuela Mustapayev to Janette Brusil.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-20-2013 Reset To Jul-09-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
